title: Understanding Tangential Acceleration
text: Tangential acceleration is related to angular acceleration and the radius of the disk. Can you recall the formula that connects these quantities?

title: Formula for Tangential Acceleration
text: The tangential acceleration \(a_t\) of a point on a rotating disk is given by the formula \(a_t $$=$$ \alpha \times r\), where \(\alpha\) is the angular acceleration and \(r\) is the radius of the disk.

title: Calculate Tangential Acceleration
text: Given that the angular acceleration \(\alpha\) is $$1.0$$ rad/s² and the radius \(r\) is $$10$$ cm, calculate the tangential acceleration \(a_t\).
